source: held-out test (count-banana-plants, aerial UAV, per-plant labels)
eval_method: raw detector, imgsz=1024, conf=0.25, NMS iou=0.7, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
note: YOLO11m. Modest but real improvement over v5 on the held-out test: mAP50 0.928 -> 0.947, recall 0.847 -> 0.861, count error lower; F1 tied. Single farm/region; recalibrate count per farm.
